title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, discusses the "magic cycle" of research from breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation covers AI applications including flood forecasting, MedGemma, Gemini for Science, and tools like Co-Scientist and Empirical Research Assistance, alongside recent advances in speculative decoding, generative UI, and quantum computing.
writeup: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, frames a "magic cycle" that moves research from breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation surveys applied AI work including flood forecasting, MedGemma, and Gemini for Science, along with tools such as Co-Scientist and Empirical Research Assistance. It also touches on recent advances in speculative decoding, generative UI, and quantum computing.
